name: rosetta
description: Rosetta for Codex - Software Engineering Accelerator instruction set, workflows, and guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Rosetta core skills and bundled local references for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Rosetta 2.0 for Codex. Includes reusable skills and bundled local rules and workflow references generated from the Rosetta instruction set.
defaultPrompt: Use the load-context skill first, then consult rules/INDEX.md and workflows/INDEX.md from the Rosetta plugin bundle when you need local Rosetta guidance.
Use Rosetta for structured planning, coding, requirements, and validation workflows.
